text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare Part D Event (PDE)/Drug Characteristics Codebook │ July 2025 │ V 1.8 30 

NCPDP_ID 

LABEL: NCPDP Pharmacy identifier 

DESCRIPTION: This is the unique identification number assigned by the National Council for Prescription Drug 
Programs (NCPDP) to every licensed pharmacy in the United States and its territories. 

This field also enables linkage between pharmacies in the Part D Event (PDE) File and the CCW 
Pharmacy
